# Math Functions (Index)

## Core arithmetic and transforms
- `AbsValue(x)` — absolute value
- `Sqrt(x)` — square root
- `Power(x, y)` — exponent
- `Exp(x)` — exponential
- `Log(x)` — natural log

## Trig
- `Sin(x)`, `Cos(x)`, `Tan(x)`
- `Asin(x)`, `Acos(x)`, `Atan(x)`

## Rounding
- `Round(x, n)`
- `Ceiling(x)`
- `Floor(x)`

## Aggregation helpers often paired with math
- `Average(data, length)`
- `StDev(data, length)`
- `Highest(data, length)`
- `Lowest(data, length)`
